title: INF-3 Activation Steering UI (vector editor + intensity slider + layer picker)
goal: Steering vector editor in Inference Lab per AC-INFER-LAB-UI-TOGGLES: list of registered vectors with active-toggle, intensity slider, layer-index picker; capture-from-contrastive-prompts wizard; hidden when capabilities.supportsActivationSteering == false.
expected_diff_shape: New Svelte components app/src/components/inference_lab/SteeringVectorEditor.svelte + ContrastiveCaptureWizard.svelte + store; integration into InferenceLab parent view.
unblock_conditions: MT-068 IPC + MT-097 vector store merged.
implementation_notes: Per AC-INFER-LAB-UI-TOGGLES + AC-INFER-LAB-UI-AB-COMPARE. SteeringVectorEditor.svelte: list of registered vectors (name, layer, intensity, technique badge); toggle to set active; intensity slider -10..10 (per MT-065 SteeringVector clamp); layer-index picker (dropdown of 0..n_layers from model config). ContrastiveCaptureWizard.svelte: two text areas (positive prompts, negative prompts); [Capture activations] button calls kernel_model_runtime_steering_capture for both sets; computes difference vector (positive_mean - negative_mean) at chosen layer; preview generated text with vector active vs inactive (A/B compare); [Save vector] persists with provenance=Contrastive{technique:RepE}. Hidden via capabilities.supportsActivationSteering==false. Adult-production note: per GLOBAL-PRODUCTION the wizard accepts raw explicit text in prompts (no sanitisation or moralizing in the UI); license tag picker explicit at save time.
proof_commands: cd app && pnpm exec playwright test --grep steering_vector_editor
risk_if_missed: INF-3 UI knob missing; operator cannot create or apply steering vectors interactively.
validator_focus: Hidden when unsupported; A/B compare flow present; no UI-level sanitisation of operator-provided prompt text; license picker present.

minimum_controls: No UI-level text sanitisation (operator prompts go through verbatim per GLOBAL-PRODUCTION-005).
License tag picker mandatory at save.
